success_criteria: No linting errors; No hardcoded secrets detected; Conventional Commit message format
tools_used: ESLint, Prettier, Husky, TruffleHog / GitLeaks, Commitlint
business_impact: Prevents code style debt and accidental secret leakage

success_criteria: Build success; 0 Critical/High vulnerabilities in dependencies; 0 Critical IaC misconfigurations
tools_used: npm audit / Snyk, Tfsec / Checkov, SonarQube
escalation_procedure: Notify Security Lead if vulnerability cannot be patched
business_impact: Ensures artifact integrity and infrastructure compliance (CIS Benchmarks)

success_criteria: 100% Pass rate; Overall Coverage > 80%; Critical Components (Auth, Saga, PII Redaction) Coverage = 100%
escalation_procedure: Lead Developer review required for coverage exemptions
business_impact: Validates core logic stability, specifically Financial Integrity and Privacy Compliance

success_criteria: 100% Pass rate on API Contract tests; Database migration success; LocalStack interactions verified
business_impact: Ensures microservices (Auth, Payment, AI) communicate correctly before deployment

success_criteria: Vector Search p95 < 500ms; API p95 < 250ms; CSV Import 10k rows processable without OOM
escalation_procedure: Create High Priority Ticket if degradation > 10% from baseline
business_impact: Guarantees system scalability and responsiveness for Vendor Matching and Ingestion

success_criteria: 0 Critical/High findings in DAST scan; 100% PII Redaction verification on test corpus
tools_used: OWASP ZAP, Custom PII Scanners, AWS Macie
business_impact: Prevents GDPR violations and financial fraud risks (Webhook replay)

success_criteria: Critical User Journeys (Login, Proposal Submit, Payout) Pass; WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance Pass; LCP < 2.5s
escalation_procedure: Release Manager approval required to override non-critical UI failures
business_impact: Ensures User Experience and Accessibility standards are met

success_criteria: All prior gates passed; Change Audit Log complete; Rollback plan verified; Staging Sign-off received
business_impact: Final governance check before impacting real users and financial data

success_criteria: Error Rate < 0.1%; API Latency within 10% of baseline; Cluster Autoscaler functioning
business_impact: Minimizes downtime and impact of regression in production
